summary: Replace the SwiftUI menu bar scene with an AppKit status item so startup no longer hangs at 14%.

changed: Menu bar uses an AppKit NSStatusItem (same pattern as DiskWise) instead of a separate SwiftUI MenuBarExtra scene
Menu bar icon appears only after startup completes; toggle it anytime in Settings → Menu bar
fixed: Startup no longer hangs at 14% on “Loading workspace data” caused by status-item scene registration during launch
